tasks.subject: Task 1: Create branch + split the brew template
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Branch the work, and bring `:brew-init` itself under the init/load rule by moving its aliases into a new `:brew-load`.

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc` (`:brew-init` block ~143-162).

**Acceptance Criteria:** new branch off main; `:brew-init` only export+add; `:brew-load` has bbd/bz; `:brew-update` unchanged; syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic ':brew-load; alias bbd bz'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic ':brew-load; alias bbd bz'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new branch off main", ":brew-init has only export + add", ":brew-load has bbd/bz aliases", ":brew-update unchanged", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Group A — init-only blocks (new gated wait1 triggers)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wrap sops, sqlite, glow, gnupg, parallel, claude, docker, ncdu in `:<name>-init` + new `zi auto has"<cmd>" wait1 for <name>`.

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** 8 `:<name>-init` defined; 8 gated wait1 triggers; no inline export/link remain; syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic 'for f in sops sqlite glow gnupg parallel claude docker ncdu; do functions :$f-init >/dev/null && echo "$f ok"; done'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'for f in sops sqlite glow gnupg parallel claude docker ncdu; do functions :$f-init >/dev/null && echo ok; done'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 :<name>-init functions", "8 new gated wait1 triggers", "no inline export/link remain", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Group A — init+load and synchronous blocks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ansible/node/wget/youtube (gated wait1, aliases->load) + less/python synchronous (python gated python3, keep `if has brew` libexec inside init).

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** ansible/node/wget init+load, youtube load-only; less/python sync; PAGER/EDITOR set at sourcing; syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic 'print -r -- $PAGER; functions :python-init :ansible-load :wget-load >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'print -r -- $PAGER; functions :python-init :ansible-load :wget-load >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ansible/node/wget split init+load", "youtube load-only", "less/python synchronous, python gated python3", "PAGER/EDITOR at sourcing", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Group B — reuse existing trigger (no load-body interplay)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `:<name>-init`/`:<name>-load` to mise, aws, uv, go (rename `for golang`->`for go`), ruby (merge `:ruby-load` into `:ruby-init`), fzf, copier — reusing existing triggers/timing. uv/go/ruby stay synchronous.

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** new init functions defined before trigger; go trigger `for go`; old `:ruby-load`/`:golang-*` gone; uv/go/ruby PATH at sourcing; syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic 'print -l $path | grep -E "uv/bin|go/bin|gem"; functions :go-load :copier-load :aws-init :mise-init :fzf-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'print -l $path | grep -E uv/bin; functions :go-load :copier-load :aws-init :mise-init :fzf-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mise/aws/uv/fzf gain :*-init", "go renamed for go + :go-init/:go-load", "ruby merged, old :ruby-load gone", "copier gains :copier-load", "uv/go/ruby synchronous", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Group B — blocks with -load body interplay (incl. git verification)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert opentofu, gcloud, colima, neovim; add `:git-load` and verify the `as"completion"` trigger fires atload (fallback: keep git aliases inline).

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** opentofu init + tf aliases in load; gcloud-init added, gcloud-load intact; colima init + alias in load; neovim init+load synchronous (EDITOR set); git-load via completion line OR inline fallback (verified interactively); syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic 'print -r -- $EDITOR; functions :opentofu-init :colima-init :gcloud-init :neovim-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'` plus interactive git-load pipe test.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'print -r -- $EDITOR; functions :opentofu-init :colima-init :gcloud-init :neovim-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["opentofu init+load", "gcloud-init added, load intact", "colima init+load", "neovim init+load synchronous, EDITOR set", "git-load via completion OR inline fallback verified", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Group C — rule-consistency migrations of existing hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** bat (`-load`->`-init`), eza (split), tmux (split + repoint `:tmux-update` to `:tmux-init`), postgresql (`-load`->`-init`), vscode (`-load`->`-init`). atuin/direnv unchanged.

**Files:** Modify `zsh/.zshrc`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** renames/splits done; `:tmux-update` calls `:tmux-init`; old hook names gone; syntax + sourcing clean.

**Verify:** `zsh -ic 'functions :bat-init :eza-init :eza-load :tmux-init :tmux-load :postgresql-init :vscode-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "zsh -ic 'functions :bat-init :eza-init :eza-load :tmux-init :tmux-load :postgresql-init :vscode-init >/dev/null && echo hooks-ok'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bat-load->bat-init", "eza split", "tmux split + tmux-update repointed", "postgresql/vscode load->init", "atuin/direnv unchanged", "old names gone", "syntax + sourcing clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Full verification pass
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Verify the whole file in a real interactive shell — env/aliases/PATH/perf — and that turbo triggers actually fire.

**Files:** None expected (verification; fix-ups land here).

**Acceptance Criteria:** clean interactive load (no collisions); turbo env+alias present after first prompt; sync prereqs immediate; no stray inline tool statements outside skip-list (ssh/ghostty/boto/ara/android/X/history/core); no zsh-bench regression vs main.

**Verify:** `{ sleep 2; print 'print -r -- "SOPS=$SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE"; alias ad'; sleep 1; print exit } | zsh -i 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'SOPS=|ad='`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["zsh/.zshrc"], "verifyCommand": "{ sleep 2; print 'print -r -- SOPS=$SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE; alias ad'; sleep 1; print exit } | zsh -i 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'SOPS=|ad='", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clean interactive load", "turbo env+alias after first prompt", "sync prereqs immediate", "no stray inline tool statements outside skip-list", "no zsh-bench regression"]}
```
